definitions: To extend one's body or a part of it, often to full length.
To extend or reach out something, such as an arm or a hand.
To make something last for a longer period than originally planned or expected.
To lie down and extend one's body fully.
examples: She likes to stretch out on the sofa after work.
He stretched out his hand to help her up.
They decided to stretch out the project over several months.
The cat stretched out in a patch of sunlight.
